word: G1632 - ἐκχέω - ekchéō - ek-kheh'-o - Gush out

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκχέωἐκχύνω

- Transliteration: Ekcheo

- Phonetic: ek-kheh'-o

- Definition:

1. to pour out, shed forth

2. metaph. to bestow or distribute largely

- Origin: from G1537

- TDNT entry: 09:47,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and χέω cheō (to pour); to pour forth; figuratively to bestow: - gush (pour) out run greedily (out) shed (abroad forth) spill.
